caption: The video depicts a classroom scene where a group of children, seated at wooden desks, are actively participating in a lesson. The children appear engaged, with several raising their hands, possibly to answer questions or contribute to the discussion. The classroom is modestly furnished with simple wooden desks and benches, and the walls are adorned with educational drawings and writings on a chalkboard. The atmosphere suggests an interactive learning environment, with the students showing enthusiasm and attentiveness. A subtitle appears, indicating that one of the students is named Patience and has fled her country due to lack of security, adding a layer of personal narrative to the scene. The overall setting conveys a sense of community and education in a resource-limited environment.
